title: WorkerMessage
description: Closed envelope for every `postMessage` between the main thread and the AI bot Web Worker (`tasks/mvp/10-heuristic-ai/06-run-ai-in-web-worker.md`). Both ends `Zod.parse` against this schema before dispatch; the inner `payload.command` is additionally validated against `command.schema.json` before the reducer is invoked. Mismatched `version` drops the message and emits `SecurityEvent { kind: 'worker_message_invalid' }`.

kind.description: Closed message kinds. `COMPUTE_MOVE` is main → worker; `MOVE_RESULT` is worker → main; `ABORT` cancels an in-flight computation; `PING` / `PONG` is a liveness check.

version.description: Envelope version. Pinned at 1 today; incrementing this value invalidates every older worker bundle and forces a reload via the `version_mismatch` SecurityEvent path.

correlationId.description: UUID v4 minted on the `COMPUTE_MOVE` and echoed by `MOVE_RESULT`. Used for log correlation and to drop late results from a cancelled computation.

stateView.description: AdventureState projection per `docs/architecture/ai-contract.md`. The reducer view is opaque to the worker; the schema does not pin its shape. The main thread MUST validate against the canonical adventure-state contract before posting.

command.description: Command record. Validated against `command.schema.json` before reducer dispatch; this layer only confirms the envelope shape.
